chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett No.D-66 of 2022 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 15.09.2025 Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General ************** None present for the petitioner, nor any intimation received. As per endorsement submitted by the bailiff, it is reflected that he met with the petitioner and informed him about the date of hearing, but the petitioner refused to receive the notice stating that he had settled the dispute outside the Court. Since the petitioner has compromised the matter with the respondents outside the Court, it appears that he has lost interest in pursuing the present petition. In view of the above circumstances, the present petition stands dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
